dataHandling.upstreamApiKeys: local-only (read from api.config, sent per-request as header, never persisted)

outbound.purpose: Compress prompts and forward to user's upstream LLM provider
Local proxy — receives requests from OpenClaw, routes to opencompress.ai

permissions.fileSystem: none (all config via api.config runtime API)
permissions.network: outbound HTTPS to www.opencompress.ai + local HTTP proxy on 127.0.0.1:8401

privacyPolicy.prompts: Compressed in-memory and forwarded. NEVER stored or logged.
privacyPolicy.upstreamKeys: Read from OpenClaw runtime config. Sent per-request via header. Never persisted server-side.
privacyPolicy.billing: Only token counts recorded. No prompt content.
